name: Dr. Bhuvanesh R
bio: Dr. Bhuvanesh leads the clinical team at Creating Links with deep expertise in occupational therapy, sensory integration, and child development. He is passionate about creating individualized therapy plans that empower children towards independence.

name: Shweta S
bio: Shweta brings her management expertise to ensure that every family at Creating Links receives seamless, compassionate care. She oversees operations, parent engagement, and the center's strategic growth.
